message:
feat(engine): enforce IFC runtime flow guards in execution orchestrator

Add a fail-closed enforcement phase between IR0->IR3 lowering and IR3
interpretation that blocks execution when the Ir2FlowProofArtifact contains
unresolved declassification obligations or runtime checkpoints. This prevents
code with outstanding information-flow-control obligations from reaching the
interpreter, closing a gap where secret-labeled data could flow to
insufficiently-cleared sinks without operator approval.

Key changes:
- New OrchestratorError::IfcRuntimeGuardBlocked variant
- New phase_enforce_runtime_flow_guards() method inspecting Ir2FlowProofArtifact
- Integration into execute() pipeline between lowering and IR3 interpretation
- Helper constructors (package_with_source, empty_flow_artifact) for test setup

Adds 4 unit tests: static artifact passthrough, blocking on pending
declassifications, blocking on runtime checkpoints, and end-to-end test
verifying the orchestrator blocks before reaching the interpreter.

Also updates .beads/issues.jsonl with latest status for related tracking issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
